summary: W1526 connects the W1525 W987 endpoint-facts/localized selected-cochain W865 target-isomorphism surface to the W864 target-ExactAt stable-ExactAt route. It names the W843 target-ExactAt direct-source data induced by the W1525 W844 target-isomorphism branches, records preservation of the W1521 W870 exact-input branches and the W844/W808 target-ExactAt payload, composes the closed-map and closed-embedding direct-calculus and stable-package paths through W864, preserves the 74-input ledger, and leaves the final original four-task completion surface nonterminal with productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the original four-task contract.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.
W1526 only routes the W1519/W1524/W1525 74-field surface through the existing W864 target-ExactAt stable-ExactAt route; it does not prove the 74 constructor inputs from independent mathematical data.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; the current route still relies on assumed boundary, relation, target-surjectivity, target-compactness, mapped-cokernel, selected-difference, strict-preimage, normalized-lift, fixed-target uniqueness, source-triangulation, endpoint, localized-unit, unit mapping-cone, selected-cochain, strict-realization, iso-closure, target-isomorphism, and target-ExactAt fields rather than a positive product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.

Discharge the W1526/W1525/W1524/W1523/W1522/W1521/W1520/W1519/W1518/W1517/W1516/W1515/W1514/W1513/W1512/W1511/W1510/W1509/W1508/W1507/W1506/W1505/W1504/W1503/W1502/W1501/W1500/W1499/W1498/W1497/W1496/W1495 route inputs and remaining W1494 constructor inputs, or replace the field-ledger route with an explicit positive witness satisfying the positive-witness supplement.
Before any product-success claim, rerun the source-contradiction gate, negative fixtures, clean checkout verification, root external audit, and clean-extracted packet audit.
